title: The Saruyama Alliance Gets Involved
description: Masira, Shojo, and Cricket begin preparing the Going Merry for the dangerous route through the Knock Up Stream.
scene: Across pages 10, 11, 12, 13, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Masira, Shojo, Luffy, Nami. Masira, Shojo, and Cricket begin preparing the Going Merry for the dangerous route through the Knock Up Stream.

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: And so I ran away from home,

dialogue.speaker: Shojo
dialogue.text: Oh, you're a pirate too, mister?

dialogue.speaker: Shojo
dialogue.text: What kind of joke is this!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Then you'll have to do it alone!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: I didn't come here to find gold,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: And clear up my ancestor's name...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It was a personal fight between me,

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: Why're the monkeys here with you?

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: They're just fans of the story.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Well that's a pretty simple relationship...

summary: Masira, Shojo, and Cricket begin preparing the Going Merry for the dangerous route through the Knock Up Stream.
